Finding: Restricted internal sources are present in a public repository.
Required action: Make canonical repository private or replace public distribution with a sanitized mirror.
Resolution: Administrative scripts and CI guard prepared in remediation bundle.

Finding: Publication occurred with claim evidence and specialist reviews outstanding.
Required action: Record exception and complete evidence for ICE-CLM-001 through ICE-CLM-004 before reuse.

Finding: Source status did not conform to controlled status vocabulary.
Required action: Normalize status to Accepted and track author-final as source_stage.
Resolution: Register, manifest, schema, and validators updated.

Finding: No CODEOWNERS, branch protection automation, or validation workflows were present.
Required action: Add CI controls and branch-protection script.
Resolution: Four workflows, validators, CODEOWNERS, and admin script added.

Finding: Branch prefixes and repository initialization date were inconsistent.
v1.0.0 release omitted canonical approved Markdown.
Resolution: v1.0.1 release snapshot added with Markdown, DOCX, PDF, manifest, notes, and hashes.
